label: Variational autoencoders

node.label: Variational autoencoders
node.definition: A variational autoencoder learns a probabilistic latent space by optimizing reconstruction quality together with a regularized approximate posterior.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Variational autoencoders is to connect Autoencoders, ELBO & variational objectives to downstream capabilities including Drug discovery, protein & molecular design.
examples: substrate for Drug discovery, protein & molecular design
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Autoencoders, ELBO & variational objectives.

dependencies.rationale: Variational autoencoders extends or specializes the architecture family Autoencoders.
Variational autoencoders is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family ELBO & variational objectives.
Variational autoencoders is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Reparameterization & differentiable sampling.
